items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to unlock transitions and maintain an audit trail. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for unlocking transitions and an audit trail but lacks concrete evidence that this requirement has been fulfilled, leading to an inconclusive validation process.
